registry_entry_t(3) Library Functions Manual registry_entry_t(3)

NAME

registry_entry_t - Registry entry - stores option definition with mode bitmask and metadata.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/registry/common.h>

Data Fields


const char * long_name
char short_name
option_type_t type
size_t offset
const void * default_value
Default value (single value for all modes, or NULL if mode_default_getter is set). size_t default_value_size
const char * help_text
const char * group
const char * arg_placeholder
Custom argument placeholder (e.g., SHELL[FILE]"insteadofSTR). bool required
const char * env_var_name
bool(* validate_fn )(const void *options_struct, char **error_msg)
bool(* parse_fn )(const char *arg, void *dest, char **error_msg)
bool owns_memory
bool optional_arg
option_mode_bitmask_t mode_bitmask
option_metadata_t metadata
Enum values, numeric ranges, examples. mode_default_getter_fn mode_default_getter
Mode-aware default getter (NULL if using default_value) - LAST for backward compat.

Detailed Description

Registry entry - stores option definition with mode bitmask and metadata.

Definition at line 31 of file options/registry/common.h.

Field Documentation

const char* registry_entry_t::arg_placeholder

Custom argument placeholder (e.g., "SHELL [FILE]" instead of "STR").
